episodes.text: POD1 lap appendectomy: port sites clean and dry, pain 3/10 with regular analgesia, tolerating clear fluids.
Seizure history on levetiracetam BD; seizure precautions in place (padded rails, suction at bedside); last seizure four months ago.
episodes.why_hint: do not miss levetiracetam doses (0800/2000); keep precautions set up
